meta.note: The four workspaces. Data-access rules feed the brand gate in lib/confidentiality.mjs.

items.name: Stuart Crowley
items.audience: Founders, commercial leaders, event and media operators, industry peers
items.voiceNote: Commercially sharp, conversational, direct, curious, dry, comfortable admitting uncertainty. British English. Credibility before conversion.
ctas: No CTA at all is fine

items.name: Strait Up Growth
items.audience: Founder-led B2B businesses (5-100 people) in Singapore, Asia and Europe: founders, MDs, commercial directors, COOs, heads of growth/sales, marketing directors, RevOps leaders
items.voiceNote: Sells commercial clarity and operating leverage, never hours. Narrative: "I know where commercial systems break, and I use AI to make the fix faster." Never an AI agency, never a LinkedIn coaching service.
ctas: Reply and tell me how you run it today
restrictedTopics: Anything sourced from NEXT.io confidential material
items.positioningStatus: DRAFT ASSUMPTION. Positioning and services are editable and unconfirmed until Stuart signs them off.

items.name: NEXT.io
items.voiceNote: Employer context. Confidential by default: deals, margins, pipeline, people never leave this workspace (rule R8).

items.name: NEXTPredict
items.audience: Prediction markets category: operators, infrastructure, capital, compliance
items.voiceNote: Category vocabulary only: prediction markets, event contracts, market structure. Never betting/gambling/casino/sportsbook/wagering (linter-enforced). Voice bible: data/voice/stuart-voice.md.
ctas: Soft summit link, once, as context
